overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, starting from inside a building, exiting onto neon-lit streets with passing police vehicles, then transitioning into a serene minimalist memorial garden with tall illuminated stone pillars, ending with an encounter with meditating figures. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring high-quality reflections and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark building interior looking out to city

events.description: exiting dark building interior through large doorway into rainy neon-lit city street
transition from dim interior lighting to bright artificial outdoor neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking out of a dark building through a large rectangular doorway into the rainy cyberpunk city night

entered.detail: large rectangular exit frame leading to the city street with heavy rain visible outside
tall buildings with glowing neon signs and holographic advertisements visible through the doorway
rain-slicked road surface reflecting the blue and orange city lights
tall pole with bright overhead light illuminating the wet street

segments.scene_description: The clip begins inside a dark building with stone walls, looking out through a large doorway at a rainy neon-lit city. The camera walks forward, exiting the building and transitioning from the dim interior to the bright, wet urban street outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban downtown street with neon advertising

events.description: police vehicle with glowing blue text drives past on the left side of the street
turning left onto a path leading away from the main street toward a memorial garden area

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet city street, passing a police car and heading toward a quieter memorial area

notable_agents.action: police car with illuminated signage driving slowly past on the left side

entered.detail: black vehicle with blue glowing POLICE text and Japanese characters on the side
large illuminated advertisements and holographic displays on building facades
tall skyscrapers with reflective glass surfaces and neon accents
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk along the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wet asphalt street surrounded by towering glass buildings and bright neon billboards. A police car passes by on the left with glowing signage. The camera continues forward then begins turning left toward a more secluded area, leaving the busy street behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern memorial garden with aligned stone pillars

events.description: leaving the open city street and entering a structured memorial area with tall stone pillars and walls
ground surface changes from asphalt to wet paved tiles, architecture shifts to minimalist concrete forms

agents.ego_description: walking into a serene memorial space with tall illuminated pillars, leaving the busy street behind

entered.detail: monolithic rectangular stone columns arranged in rows with uplighting at their bases
tall textured concrete walls running parallel to the walkway
recessed circular lights embedded in the walkway illuminating the pillars from below
narrow wet paved path between the stone structures with reflective surface

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the open street into a serene, minimalist memorial garden. Tall stone pillars line the path, illuminated by ground lights that cast dramatic shadows. The noise of the city fades as the camera enters this sheltered corridor of stone and concrete.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor between memorial pillars with landscaped vegetation

events.description: landscaped trees and planter boxes become visible within the memorial garden corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrow pillar corridor, passing landscaped trees in white planters

entered.detail: carefully pruned trees with yellow-green foliage in rectangular planters
white rectangular containers housing the memorial trees
patches of tall grass and vegetation between the walkway and walls

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper into the memorial corridor where the stone pillars create a rhythmic pattern. Landscaped trees in white planters appear, adding organic shapes to the geometric stone architecture. The path remains narrow and intimate, with walls and pillars enclosing the space.

events.description: two figures in white clothing appear sitting on the ground between the stone pillars

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing two figures sitting on the ground in the memorial corridor

notable_agents.action: two figures in white robes sitting on the wet ground meditating or resting between the stone pillars

segments.scene_description: Approaching two figures dressed in white sitting on the ground between the pillars, seemingly meditating. The camera continues past them through the narrow corridor, with the stone pillars continuing into the misty distance and the city lights faintly visible beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dark interior into a rainy, neon-lit metropolis before settling into a serene, minimalist memorial garden. It begins inside a dim building with stone walls, moving forward through a large doorway to emerge onto a wet urban street illuminated by bright billboards and towering glass buildings. As a police car with glowing signage passes by, the camera turns away from the busy thoroughfare and enters a secluded corridor where the city noise fades and tall, ground-lit stone pillars create dramatic shadows. The scene then shifts deeper into this sheltered space, passing landscaped trees in white planters that soften the geometric concrete architecture. Finally, the camera glides past two meditating figures dressed in white, continuing through the narrow rhythmic pattern of pillars toward a misty distance where the city lights remain only as a faint glow.
